title: garlicky peruvian shrimp shupe
description: a light, nostalgic peruvian dish featuring shrimp, garlic, and pretzels, perfect for a weeknight meal. dairy-free-friendly and easily made on the grill.

ingredients.name: gruyère cheese
ingredients.notes: dairy-free alternative such as soy cheese or vegan gruyère

instructions: preheat grill to medium-high heat and brush shrimp with olive oil.
grill shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
in a large pot, melt gruyère cheese over medium heat.
add chicken broth, garlic, and pretzels to the pot and stir to combine.
add cooked shrimp to the pot and stir to coat with the gruyère sauce.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
serve the shrimp hot, garnished with additional gruyère cheese and pretzels if desired.
